channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: 2026 AI salaries: MLOps vs prompt engineering
item.description: ML Ops vs prompt engineering salaries in 2026 — $215k vs $155k median, failure rates, cost savings, and the real skills that move the needle.

item.title: Ship real systems: Africa’s remote hiring proof
item.description: Cut remote hiring time from months to weeks with a portfolio of production incidents and cost deltas — real metrics, real repos, real stories from Nairobi fintech systems.

item.title: Choose the right real-time protocol
item.description: We were running 45k concurrent connections across 8 t4g.medium instances and still seeing 400ms p95 end-to-end latency when the room had >200 users.

item.title: Bargain remote rate: Node 20 + salary script
item.description: Convert local costs to remote salary with Node 20 + live FX rates. Shows 17 contracts 2025-2026 and how transparent quoting beat pushback by 7-24 %.

item.title: RAG in prod: why 3-week meltdowns happen
item.description: Cut RAG latency 87% and AWS bill 73% with hot/cold index split, GPU reranking, and Redis cache stampede fixes — real numbers and code from a production 100k RPM system.

item.title: Kill the "max pool size 10" lie
item.description: Digging in, I found 90% of the pool was stuck waiting for queries that had been running for minutes — the pool was exhausted because long-running…

item.title: Multi-agent prod failures demystified
item.description: Cut multi-agent system costs 62% with idempotency and observability — the negotiation loops, Redis OOM risks, and latency traps most teams miss before Black Friday hits.

item.title: Leak-proof Postgres pools in serverless
item.description: Avoid 32 connection errors and cut P95 latency 63% by capping pool size at the minimum of system limits and saturated workload — the mistake 90% of teams still make in 2026.

item.title: Portfolio: ship small, prove impact, get hired
item.description: The honest answer is that a 500-line CRUD app with a README that explains the trade-offs will beat a 5,000-line monolith with no documentation every time.

item.title: AI skills that pay: TensorFlow vs PyTorch in 2026
item.description: The 2026 Stack Overflow AI Skills Report shows that engineers who can debug GPU OOM errors, optimize data loaders, and deploy models without memory leaks…

item.title: Compare WebSockets, SSE, and long polling
item.description: My first mistake was assuming 500ms latency would translate to 500ms end-to-end.

item.title: RAG at scale: why 6K QPS breaks your FAISS
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 88% at 10K QPS — FAISS sharding, Graviton rerankers, and the cache stampede mistake most teams miss.

item.title: Remote salary hack: 3x offers in 10 minutes
item.description: Negotiate remote salaries with 3x uplift using PPP-adjusted anchors — Numbeo, Levels.fyi, and Python 3.11. Real results from 12 negotiations in 2026.

item.title: Save 40% on AWS: Graviton + spot done right
item.description: Cut AWS bill 42% using Graviton4 ARM and 70% Spot instances — cache warming, drain loops, and the 3 mistakes most teams make in 2026

item.title: AI salary killers: fine-tuning vs prompt ops in 2026
item.description: Fine-tuning vs prompt ops: compare salaries, latency, and costs in 2026. See real AWS data, LangChain vs LangGraph stacks, and the 23% salary gap.

item.title: African devs: build a portfolio that hires you
item.description: Build a portfolio that lands remote jobs from Africa in 2026 — stop grinding LeetCode and start shipping impact. Includes real systems, debugging artifacts, and the 3 concrete numbers you need.

item.title: Land remote pay with US rates in 2026
item.description: Land a $110k remote salary from a lower-cost country in 2026 — exact negotiation brief, FX hedging script, and cost-to-company table used to close 14 deals since 2023.

item.title: Production RAG pipelines: the hidden bottlenecks
item.description: How we cut RAG pipeline latency 80% in prod — vector store choice, caching, and the plumbing mistakes most tutorials skip. Costs, benchmarks, and code included.

item.title: Pool size wrong? Your DB spills
item.description: Cut database connection pool latency 50% by ditching the 5× CPU cores myth — real benchmarks, memory math, and the timeout that breaks everything

item.title: Is $100/month AI worth indie devs?
item.description: Cut AI coding budget waste with a $100/month cap — real token costs, guardrails, and when AI saves time vs when it burns cash in 2026.
